TypeScript definitions, JSON schemas, Webpack loader, license info, metadata injection, memory reports, and package management tools.

## Folders
- **[rocky-lint](rocky-lint/README.md)**: TypeScript definitions for the Rocky namespace, event interfaces, and canvas rendering context.
- **[schemas](schemas/README.md)**: JSON schemas for defining Pebble application projects, attributes, data types, file types, project types, and resource types.
- **[webpack](webpack/README.md)**: Webpack loader for restricted resource loading and a Python template for generating webpack configurations.

## Files
- **[__init__.py](__init__.py.md)**: License information for the Apache License, Version 2.0.
- **[inject_metadata.py](inject_metadata.py.md)**: Injects metadata into a Pebble app binary, including handling of app flags, CRC, and relocation entries.
- **[memory_reports.py](memory_reports.py.md)**: Tools for generating formatted memory usage and error reports for Pebble firmware binaries.
- **[pebble_package.py](pebble_package.py.md)**: Tools for managing Pebble packages, including packing, unpacking, and handling exceptions.
